不过知道剧情的穿越者写的自然不猥琐很不错了。
乐队综漫yyds！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772767490,"group_id":"7544369407162600510","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4tcJcO9I3MqfDxRqvhPjHw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/730f1c0a4c2f46e3a0356535e6a9d112~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621759&x-signature=T0e7VIxnqpxOwqVIQgp1ekZjMdY%3D","user_id":"210755982206503","user_name":"河西的胡良"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"210755982206503","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1699650452,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544369407162600510","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫】【日常】【多女主】
穿越综漫世界，源义心本想靠在富二代的身份就这么过上平淡的日子。谈一个与自己兴趣相投的女友，偶尔玩一玩音乐，顺便继承一下丰厚的家产。
明明自己的愿望是那么的简单，可为什么总是有哪里不对劲呢？
特别是身边的那些美少女们，本来一个个都说与自己是好朋友，源义心也是这么做的。
可是日子一天天过去，他发现她们看自己的眼神渐渐不对劲了起来。
